MaxLineLength:ApprovalsScreen.kt$onClick = { scope.launch { snackbarHostState.showSnackbar("Bulk action is illustrative.") }; selectionMode = false; selectedIds.value = emptySet() }
MaxLineLength:ApprovalsScreen.kt$onToggleSelect = { id -> selectedIds.value = if (id in selectedIds.value) selectedIds.value - id else selectedIds.value + id }
